name: John Doe
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for a thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
intermediate_belief: I must always be prepared and meet expectations to avoid failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not prepared, I will fail and be judged negatively.
coping_strategies: Overthinking and worrying excessively about tasks and social interactions.
situation: Experiencing a recurring dream in which coworkers talk negatively about the individual.
auto_thought: Why am I feeling wound up? Why is all this worrying me? Why can't I relax?
behavior: Avoidance of situations that might lead to failure or judgment.
